integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Aerobridge admin panel via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigated to http://localhost:8000/admin/ with the Django administration interface visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show direct database manipulation (e.g., sqlite3) or Django ORM scripts being run to import the data directly. The data entry should be done via the web browser.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent filling out forms in the Django admin panel or the final records successfully saved in the admin interface, rather than just displaying a text file or mock HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target operator is 'Rural Drone Services'. The expected fleet consists of 4 aircraft: N-RDS01 (DJI Matrice 300 RTK, active), N-RDS02 (DJI Mavic 2 Enterprise, active), N-RDS03 (Parrot Anafi USA, active), and N-RDS04 (Skydio X2, maintenance). The active status should be mapped to an appropriate active state like 'In Operation' or 'Service', while maintenance should be mapped to 'Maintenance'.
